subject: URGENT: Big order from Client X
body: Hey Raj, we just closed a massive deal with Client X. They need 700 units of SKU-A and 300 units of SKU-B shipped by next Friday. I promised we can do it. Can you confirm we have enough Raw Material Y to make this happen?

subject: Delay on recent PO
body: Dear Inventory Team, apologies but our shipping container is delayed. The 500 units of Raw Material Z you ordered won't arrive until May 5th.
